title: erigeron peregrinus subsp. callianthemus
intro: Erigeron peregrinus subsp. callianthemus, also known as the western daisy or Callianthemum western daisy, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Western daisy is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other illnesses.
